title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say why these moments might be memorable and how the people might be feeling.

images.label: A
images.description: A winner of a race crossing the finish line with their arms raised in triumph.

images.label: B
images.description: A family seeing each other for the first time in a busy airport arrivals hall.

followUp.question: Which of these moments do you think is the most emotional? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say why the people might have chosen to see art in these ways and what they are getting out of the experience.

images.label: D
images.description: A solitary person looking at a huge, modern painting in a minimalist white art gallery.

images.label: E
images.description: A crowd of people in a street looking at a large, colorful piece of graffiti or mural art.

followUp.question: Which way of experiencing art do you find most interesting? (Why?)
